raw_block:
–1. Also called AZZAH
  .A city of the PhilistinesJos 13:3;Jer 25:20
  .One of the border cities of the CanaanitesGe 10:19
  .A city of the Avim and AnakimDe 2:23;Jos 11:22
  .Allotted to JudahJos 15:47;Jud 1:18
  .A temple of Dagon, situated atJud 16:23
  .Samson dies atJud 16:21-31
  .On the western boundary of the kingdom of Israel in the time 
of Solomon1Ki 4:24
  .Struck by PharaohJer 47:1
  .Prophecies relating toAm 1:6,7;Zep 2:4;Zec 9:5
  .Desert ofAc 8:26-39
–2. A city of the tribe of EphraimJud 6:4;1Ch 7:28
